name: Horror Escape Room Visual Novel
description: A narrative-driven horror escape room game built in Ren'Py with branching storyline, puzzle mechanics, and an interactive inventory system. Features a combination lock keypad, collectible puzzle pieces, countdown timer, point-and-click hotspot system, and a secret unlockable room. Developed collaboratively using Git with branch protection and a modular file structure.

name: P2P Blockchain File-Sharing System
description: Decentralized peer-to-peer platform in Rust and TypeScript supporting blockchain-based micropayments, encrypted file sharing, and a trust/reputation system. Implemented DHT-based peer discovery and integrated Ethereum (Geth) for on-chain mining and transaction validation. Features a Svelte GUI with a live crypto-mining dashboard.

name: Phreddit — Reddit Clone
description: Full-stack Reddit-style web app on the MERN stack with full CRUD operations on posts, comments, and user profiles. Secure authentication via bcrypt and role-based access control. RESTful APIs handling all frontend-backend communication with clean separation of concerns and input validation.
